title: Salem, Tamil Nadu — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Salem is a city in Tamil Nadu with a population of 920,000. A major industrial city in Tamil Nadu, known for its steel plants, textile mills, and mango orchards.
